summary: Bug Fix Verification Complete - Both reported bugs are FIXED. 1) Night auction timers now show correct countdown (e.g., 05:17, 04:40) instead of 00:00:00. The LiveTimer component correctly handles isPaused prop and the isNightPaused check recognizes both is_night_paused flag and status='night_paused'. 2) Day/Night auction logic working correctly - during night time (23:30-06:00 Berlin), day auctions are paused (status='day_paused') and night auctions are active. All filter buttons (Live, Anfänger, Gutschein, Nacht, Ende, VIP) work correctly. iPad responsive layout displays properly.

bug_1_night_timer.details: Night auction timers show correct countdown (05:17, 04:40, etc.) instead of 00:00:00. LiveTimer component at line 194-269 correctly handles isPaused prop.

bug_2_day_night_logic.details: Day/Night auction scheduler (server.py line 786-868) correctly pauses day auctions during night time and activates night auctions.
bug_2_day_night_logic.evidence: API shows: 5 night auctions with status='active', 51 day auctions with status='day_paused'

filter_buttons.details: All 6 filter buttons work correctly: Live (5), Anfänger (0), Gutschein (0), Nacht (5), Ende (37), VIP (0)

auction_of_the_day.details: Auction of the Day displays correctly with timer showing 85:24 countdown

ipad_responsive.details: iPad viewport (768x1024) displays correctly - all filter buttons visible, auction cards properly sized, AOTD visible

ended_auctions.details: Ende filter shows 37 ended auctions with 'Beendet' badges

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs are fixed: 1) Night auction timers show correct countdown, not 00:00:00. The fix was in LiveTimer component (isPaused prop) and AuctionCard (isNightPaused check for status='night_paused'). 2) Day/Night scheduler works correctly - during night time (23:30-06:00 Berlin), day auctions are paused and night auctions are active. Current state: 5 active night auctions, 51 day_paused day auctions. All filter buttons work. iPad responsive layout works. Note: OpenAI model was changed from gpt-4o to gpt-4.1 for image analysis endpoint.
